label: Predictive representation learning / JEPA

node.label: Predictive representation learning / JEPA
node.definition: The learner predicts abstract target representations from context rather than reconstructing every low-level detail.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Predictive representation learning / JEPA is modeled as depending on Self-supervised learning, Embeddings & distributed representations and feeding downstream nodes such as Joint-embedding predictive architectures.
